fullName.display: 苔丝琳德 “苔丝” 哈伦德里亚

backstory.original: Tess grew up in a small village where she wreaked havoc as an amateur thief (she stole to see if she could, not because she wanted to keep the items - mostly), before her parents sent her to be trained by an aging halfling rogue named Mel. Under Mel's mentorship, Tess became a professional infiltrator, using her skills for good. Now she's formed her own adventuring party and is actively molding them into the heroes she knows they can be.
backstory.display: 苔丝在一个小村庄长大。她是一名业余小偷，惹出了不少麻烦（她偷窃只是想测试自己的本领，而不是真的想占有那些物品——大多时候是这样）。后来，她的父母把她送走，让一位名叫梅尔的年迈半身人游荡者训练她。在梅尔的指导下，苔丝成为了一名专业的潜行者，利用自己的技能行善。现在她组建了自己的冒险队伍，并积极地将他们塑造成她所坚信的勇士。

description.original: Tess attacks the closest enemy for 1 hit.
description.display: 苔丝攻击最近的敌人，造成 1 次打击。

description.original: Tess attacks the enemy with the most health, then teleports and attacks all nearby foes.
description.display: 苔丝攻击生命值最高的敌人，然后瞬移攻击所有附近的敌人。

longDescription.original: Tess throws her dagger at the enemy with the most health for 1 ultimate hit, then teleports and deals another ultimate hit to all nearby foes.
longDescription.display: 苔丝将她的匕首投向生命值最高的敌人，造成 1 次杀招打击，然后瞬移并对所有附近的敌人造成又一次杀招打击。

description.desc: Uggie joins the party, starting next to Tess unless she's already in the formation next to another Fallbacks Champion. Uggie increases the damage of all non-adjacent Champions by $(amount)%.
乌吉加入探险队，并将默认与苔丝相邻，除非她已在阵型中并与另一位“后备队”勇士相邻。乌吉会使所有非相邻的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%。

conditions.desc: Tess increases the damage of all Champions in the columns in front of her by $amount%.
Tess increases the damage of all Champions in the columns behind her by $amount%.
苔丝会使她前列所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%。
苔丝会使所有处于她身后各列的勇士伤害提高 $amount%。

tipText.original: Tess increases the damage of Champions behind Tess, and Uggie increases the damage of Champions not next to Uggie.
tipText.display: 苔丝使在她身后的勇士伤害提高，同时乌吉使不与乌吉相邻的勇士伤害提高。

description.desc: Uggie's buff is increased by $amount% when Tess is in the formation
当苔丝在阵型中时，乌吉的增益提高 $amount%
When Uggie is with Tess, Uggie attacks a random target whenever Tess attacks or disarms a trap. Uggie's attack deals $amount seconds of BUD-based damage.
当乌吉在苔丝身边时，每当苔丝进行攻击或拆除陷阱，乌吉会攻击一个随机目标。乌吉的攻击会造成等同于 $amount 秒基础杀招伤害的伤害。

Tess throws one of her teleportation daggers at the enemy with the most health, dealing 1 ultimate hit. She then teleports behind that enemy, and stabs a bunch of times, dealing 1 ultimate hit to all targets within melee range, including the original target. She then returns to her place in the formation.
苔丝将她的一把瞬移匕首投向生命值最高的敌人，造成 1 次杀招打击。然后她会瞬移到该敌人身后，连续刺击数次，对位于近战攻击范围内的所有目标造成 1 次杀招打击，包括原目标。然后她会回到她在阵型中的位置。
Tess increases the effect of Lead The Way by $amount% for each unaffiliated Champion or Fallbacks Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一名无从属组织勇士或“后备队”勇士，苔丝会使“引领前行”的效果提升 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: When the titans are absent, ordinary souls must bear the weight of responsibility and courage.
specializationDescription.display: 当泰坦不在时，普通人必须挑起责任和勇气的重担。

description.desc: Tess increases the effect of Lead The Way by $amount% for each Champion in the formation with a ranged attack, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一名可远程攻击的勇士，苔丝会使“引领前行”的效果提升 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Tess is still learning, but she always looks ahead.
specializationDescription.display: 苔丝依然在学习，但她的目光总是往前看。

description.desc: Tess increases the effect of Lead The Way by $amount% for each Rogue Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一名身为游荡者的勇士，苔丝会使“引领前行”的效果提升 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: One day, Tess hopes to make it through her mentor's challenge to finally grab that green scarf.
specializationDescription.display: 苔丝希望有朝一日能通过她导师的考验，最终拿到那条绿色围巾。

description.desc: Tess increases the effect of Lead The Way by $(not_buffed amount)% for each different role in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一个不同的角色定位，苔丝就会使“引领前行”的效果提升 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

There's a $chance% chance when an enemy dies that they drop a Trap that Tess immediately spots. During Tess's next attack, rather than attacking, she leaps out and disarms the Trap before it can harm any of her friends. For each Trap disarmed in this way, Lead The Way is increased by $(not_buffed amount___2)%, stacking additively. Stacks persist through resets.
敌人死亡时有 $chance% 的几率掉落一个陷阱，苔丝会立即发现。苔丝下次进攻时不会进行攻击，而是会跃出并抢在陷阱伤害到她的任何朋友之前将其拆除。每有一个陷阱以这种方式被拆除，“引领前行”的效果提升 $(not_buffed amount___2)%，以加算方式堆叠。堆叠的层数在重置冒险后会保留。

tipText.original: Tess's slain enemies occasionally drop traps, which she disarms for a permanent persistent bonus to her main support ability.
tipText.display: 被苔丝击杀的敌人偶尔会掉落陷阱，她会拆除这些陷阱，从而获得对她主要支援技能的永久持续加成。

description.original: I have to care for this group. I have to be the leader they deserve.
description.display: 我必须照顾这群人。我必须成为有资格领导他们的首领。

description.original: There's no need to worry, because I have a plan.
description.display: 不用担心，因为我有一个计划。

description.original: I'm not always the best leader, but I truly believe that we're stronger together.
description.display: 我并不总是最出色的首领，但我坚信团结使我们更强大。

description.original: This is just the beginning. Wait and see.
description.display: 这才刚刚开始，拭目以待吧。

description.original: You know where you went wrong, so you know how to adjust for next time.
description.display: 你知道你哪里做错了，也就是说你知道下次该怎么改正了。

description.original: We've got something special. We shouldn't waste it. We can do great things.
description.display: 我们拥有某样特别的东西，我们不该浪费了。我们能成就一番大事的。

effects.description: Changes Lead The Way to affect Champions in columns in front of her instead of behind.

description.original: Ready to help out, girl?
description.display: 姑娘，准备好帮忙了吗？

description.original: That was fun, wasn't it, girl?
description.display: 刚才很有趣，对吧，姑娘？

description.original: Uggie has... unusual dietary needs.
description.display: 乌吉有着……非同寻常的饮食需求。

description.original: Alright, Fallbacks. It's time to take this party inside.
description.display: 好了，“后备队”的各位成员，是时候到屋子里去了。

description.original: You know I'm always prepared. It's my job to anticipate what the group needs.
description.display: 你知道我随时都会做好准备的。预判团队的需要是我的职责。

description.original: Call me Tess. My friend's name is Anson. We're professional infiltrators.
description.display: 叫我苔丝就行。我的朋友叫安森。我们是专业的潜行者。

description.original: Would everyone shut up a minute and let me get a plan together?
description.display: 大家能不能先闭嘴，让我制定一个计划？

effects.description: Increases the effect of all of Tess's Specializations by $amount%

description.original: I'm not always going to fail. Someday, I'll earn that scarf.
description.display: 我不会一直失败的。总有一天，我会得到那条围巾的。

description.original: Careful. One poke from that and it's lights out.
description.display: 当心，只要被那东西戳一下你就会晕过去。

effects.description: Tess gains the Control role and 25% of her attacks stun her targets for 5 seconds

description.original: If there's a problem, this should solve it.
description.display: 它应该能解决任何问题。

description.original: We'll always be together, won't we, girl?
description.display: 我们会永远在一起的，对吧，姑娘？

description.original: Uggie needs bacon grease, apple cores, rusty nails, cat vomit, and vinegar.
description.display: 乌吉需要培根油、苹果核、生锈的钉子、猫的呕吐物和醋。

description.original: My mask finds the traps. My hands do the rest.
description.display: My mask finds the traps. My hands do the rest.

character_sheet_details.backstory: Tess grew up in a small village where she wreaked havoc as an amateur thief (she stole to see if she could, not because she wanted to keep the items - mostly), before her parents sent her to be trained by an aging halfling rogue named Mel. Under Mel's mentorship, Tess became a professional infiltrator, using her skills for good. Now she's formed her own adventuring party and is actively molding them into the heroes she knows they can be.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Tess is a Support Champion who leads by example, buffing the damage of all Champions behind her. This trap expert has a plan for everything, increasing your formation's damage if she is given companions with a diverse set of roles. Tess can always be found with the Fallbacks' Otyugh companion Uggie nearby.

character_sheet_details.full_name: 苔丝琳德 “苔丝” 哈伦德里亚
character_sheet_details.backstory: 苔丝在一个小村庄长大。她是一名业余小偷，惹出了不少麻烦（她偷窃只是想测试自己的本领，而不是真的想占有那些物品——大多时候是这样）。后来，她的父母把她送走，让一位名叫梅尔的年迈半身人游荡者训练她。在梅尔的指导下，苔丝成为了一名专业的潜行者，利用自己的技能行善。现在她组建了自己的冒险队伍，并积极地将他们塑造成她所坚信的勇士。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 苔丝是一名支援型勇士，她以身作则，为自己身后的所有勇士提升伤害。这位陷阱专家对任何情况都有应对之策，如果给她搭配拥有多样角色定位的同伴，就能提升阵型的伤害。在苔丝身边，总能看到“后备队”的“食腐兽”同伴乌吉。

original.name: Tenacious

display.name: 坚持不懈
display.description: 我不会一直失败的。总有一天，我会得到那条围巾的。

display.name: 睡眠毒素

effects.description: 苔丝获得控制角色定位，并且她 25% 的攻击会使她的目标眩晕 5 秒

original.name: Deadly Toxin

display.name: 致命毒素
display.description: 它应该能解决任何问题。
